Grid.TextBlock:
FLASH
1. (S) Military operations in the southern Caribbean are becoming more likely as the situation deteriorates.
2. (S) PEGASUS will get underway NLT 020630Z and conduct high-speed transit to western Caribbean via the Yucatan Strait. On transiting the strait, PEGASUS will report to CTF 27 for further tasking.
3. (S) WARNING: Radio intercepts indicate Cuban forces may be operating in the strait and could attempt to block passage. Proceed under EMCON unless tactical situation does not permit. Cuban forces in the area include 2 x TURYA class hydrofoil torpedo boats, 2 x KOMAR class missile boats, and 1 x KONI or GRISHA class frigate. Cuban Air Force fighter-bombers may be scrambled if you are detected.
4. (S) 1 x SH-2F of HSL-36 will be detailed to you for reconnaissance and targeting. Note: due to low canisterized Harpoon stocks at NAS Key West, PEGASUS must depart with onboard ordnance only.
5. (S) Transit the strait and report status on reaching open waters. Good luck.
SECRET
DO NOT DECLASSIFY WITHOUT APPROVAL OF ADDRESSEE
